## Security, privacy, and provenance

- [ ] This change does not include `config.json`, credentials, tokens, private URLs, unredacted logs, or private camera imagery
- [ ] New third-party code, generated content, fonts, and assets have documented sources and license terms
- [ ] Material AI assistance is disclosed in the summary, or this change used none
- [ ] Network exposure, authentication, and persisted sensitive data were considered where relevant
